tagline: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime.
what_it_does: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime. CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE now preserves existing column and table comments by default. Previously, comments were dropped when recreating a table.
why_it_matters: New features and improvements The following features and improvements are available in this release.
key_takeaway: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime.
